title: centaurea triumfettii subsp. lingulata
intro: Centaurea triumfettii subsp. lingulata is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is commonly found in the Mediterranean region, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and slender stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Centaurea triumfettii subsp. lingulata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems.
